title: coreopsis obovatifolia
intro: Coreopsis obovatifolia, also known as Mexican tickseed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Coreopsis obovatifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Coreopsis obovatifolia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing for a versatile range of herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
